title: A Business Trip to the Mountains
article_text: My colleague and I have a duty to visit a mountain town for a commercial meeting. We will take a plane because the traffic is extremely bad on the road. My colleague bought a ticket for the flight and put it in her bag. Before the trip, we had to adopt a new technique to combine our ideas for the presentation. The hotel owner gave us a warm welcome and a free meal. During the meeting, we saw a lady who uses a special expression when she speaks. We should not hide our problems from each other because open talk leads to improvement. The marriage of our boss to a famous lady is a big topic in the company. After the meeting, we had to repeat our main points plus answer some questions. The final result of our work was equal to our background and the tools we used.

sentences.zh: 我和同事有责任去一个山城参加商业会议。

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to start to use something new'?
Which word means 'very much; to a very high degree'?

image_prompts: A man and a woman (colleagues) standing in front of a mountain town with a sign saying 'Commercial Meeting'.
A plane flying in the sky above a road full of cars (traffic jam).
A woman (colleague) holding a ticket and putting it into her bag.
Two people sitting at a table with papers, one showing a new technique and combining ideas.
A smiling hotel owner welcoming two guests, with a table of food (meal) in the background.
A meeting room with a lady speaking and making a special facial expression.
Two colleagues talking openly, with a light bulb (idea) above them and a graph showing improvement.
A boss and a famous lady in wedding clothes, with a sign 'Marriage' and company building behind.
A person standing at a whiteboard repeating main points with a plus sign and question marks.
A graph showing final result equal to background and tools, with a person looking satisfied.
